case_title: GALVAN, CATANIA VS RODRIGUEZ, FRANCISCO J.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-06-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-17-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $700. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR ONE ADDITIONAL PROGRESS REPORT AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-17-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-17-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE @ THE RATE OF $100/MONTH BEGINNING ON & POSTMARKED NO LATER THAN 10/15/05 & ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2006, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, FRANCISCO J.
PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALVAN, CATANIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, FRANCISCO J. $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $780.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY GALVAN, CATANIA AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, FRANCISCO J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, FRANCISCO J. HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-2006 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
